steps.title: Use the no-solution condition
steps.content: A system of two linear equations has no solution when the lines are parallel and distinct. Therefore, the other line must have the same slope as the given line.

steps.title: Solve for the slope
steps.content:
Rewrite the given equation in slope-intercept form so the coefficient of $x$ is visible.
$$27ry-7x=c$$
$$27ry=7x+c$$
$$y=\frac{7}{27r}x+\frac{c}{27r}$$

steps.title: Match the slope
steps.content:
The slope of any parallel line is the coefficient of $x$ in that form.
$$\frac{7}{27r}$$
The answer is D.
